mapper.select: SELECT t1.`id`, t1.`name`, t1.`parent_id` AS pid FROM `mk_sys_permissions` AS t1 LEFT JOIN `mk_sys_role_permissions` AS t2 ON t1.`id` = t2.`permission_id` LEFT JOIN `mk_sys_user_role` AS t3 ON t2.`role_id` = t3.`role_id` WHERE t1.`is_delete` = 0 AND t1.`keep_alive` = 0 AND t1.`type` IN (-1, 0, 1) AND t3.`user_id` = #{sysUserId} GROUP BY t1.`id` ORDER BY t1.`id`
SELECT t1.`permission_id` FROM `mk_sys_role_permissions` AS t1 LEFT JOIN mk_sys_permissions AS t2 ON t1.permission_id = t2.id WHERE t1.role_id = #{roleId} AND t2.parent_id != 0
